claims.claim: The Whistle (המשרוקית) verdict label נכון means the statement is true in its near-entirety
The Whistle verdict label לא מדויק means substantial parts of the statement are wrong
claims.raw_snippet: לא מדויק - חלקים מהותיים מהאמירה שגויים

claims.claim: The Whistle verdict label מטעה means the statement creates a false impression or takes facts out of context
claims.raw_snippet: מטעה - האמירה יוצרת מצג שווא או מוציאה עובדות מהקשרן

claims.claim: The Whistle verdict label לא נכון means the statement is false
The Whistle verdict label לשיפוטכם means the factual situation is too complex for a definitive score
claims.raw_snippet: לשיפוטכם - המצב העובדתי מורכב מכדי לתת ציון חד משמעי

claims.claim: The Whistle (המשרוקית of Globes) has been a member of the International Fact-Checking Network (IFCN) since 2018
claims.raw_snippet: חברה ברשת הבינלאומית של ארגוני בדיקת העובדות, ה- International Fact-Checking Network (ה- IFCN), בה היא חברה משנת 2018

claims.claim: The IFCN Code of Principles has five commitments: non-partisanship and fairness, standards and transparency of sources, transparency of funding and organization, standards and transparency of methodology, and an open and honest corrections policy
claims.raw_snippet: A commitment to Non-partisanship and Fairness ... A commitment to Standards and Transparency of Sources ... A commitment to Transparency of Funding & Organization ... A commitment to Standards and Transparency of Methodology ... A commitment to an Open & Honest Corrections Policy

claims.claim: Platform fact-checker rating labels on Hebrew content include לא נכון (false), עבר שינוי (altered), לא נכון חלקית (partly false), חסר הקשר (missing context), and סאטירה (satire)
claims.raw_snippet: לא נכון ... עבר שינוי ... לא נכון חלקית ... חסר הקשר ... סאטירה

claims.claim: Israel's Central Bureau of Statistics (Lishka Merkazit LiStatistika, cbs.gov.il) is the authoritative source for the CPI, price indices, labour force, demographics and the housing price index
The Bank of Israel publishes the official representative exchange rate (shaar yatzig) for the shekel
claims.raw_snippet: Exchange Rates | בנק ישראל - הבנק המרכזי של ישראל

claims.claim: BudgetKey (Mafteach HaTaktziv, obudget.org) is the open database of the Israeli state budget, support payments and procurement
The Knesset ParliamentInfo OData service exposes bills, committees and member entities (KNS_Bill, KNS_Committee, KNS_Person)
Official Knesset election results and turnout are published by the Central Elections Committee on data.gov.il
claims.raw_snippet: תוצאות בחירות - ועדת הבחירות המרכזית לכנסת

claims.claim: Per-MK plenum roll-call votes are published by the Knesset as the dataset titled הצבעות חברי הכנסת במליאה on data.gov.il
The government real-estate site (nadlan.gov.il) publishes recorded real-estate transaction prices
The National Insurance Institute (Bituach Leumi, btl.gov.il) is the authoritative source for the statutory average wage in the economy
FakeReporter is an Israeli public-participation research project that exposes malicious online activity and fake news
claims.raw_snippet: מיזם מחקר בשיתוף הציבור להיאבק בפעילות זדונית ברשת ופייק ניוז

claims.claim: data.gov.il is Israel's national open government data portal (CKAN) and the catch-all source for ministry datasets without a dedicated MCP
